name: Down Insane Malditos (DIM)
description: Down Insane Malditos (DIM) – Are a predominately Latino street gang located in the West LA section of Los Angeles. Their turf is known as the Cadillac-Corning area that is known for the Play Boy Gangster Crips, a predominately African-American gangs. DIM are relatively new, having been formed around 2005.
